sql_array: CREATE TABLE db_name.time_series_table (id UUID, value Float32, created_at DateTime) ENGINE=TimeSeries TAGS tags_table;
CREATE TABLE db_name.tags_table (tag_key String, tag_value String) ENGINE=MergeTree() ORDER BY tag_key;
SELECT * FROM timeSeriesTags(db_name.time_series_table) WHERE tag_key = ANY (SELECT tag_key FROM db_name.tags_table WHERE tag_value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM db_name.time_series_table WHERE created_at = ANY (SELECT created_at FROM db_name.time_series_table WHERE value > 20.0);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM db_name.time_series_table WHERE value = ANY (SELECT MAX(value) FROM db_name.time_series_table);
SELECT t.*, ts.value FROM db_name.tags_table t JOIN db_name.time_series_table ts ON t.tag_value = ANY (SELECT tag_value FROM db_name.tags_table GROUP BY tag_value HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);
SELECT AVG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY CAST(created_at AS Date) ORDER BY value) AS avg_per_day FROM db_name.time_series_table;
SELECT tag_key, COUNT(*) FROM db_name.tags_table GROUP BY tag_key HAVING COUNT(*) < ANY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM db_name.time_series_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL);
SELECT DISTINCT tag_key FROM db_name.tags_table WHERE tag_value IS NULL AND tag_key = ANY (SELECT DISTINCT tag_key FROM db_name.tags_table WHERE tag_value IS NOT NULL);
